# ParagonTooltipChrome.TextFrame property

A text-only tooltip (`TextTooltip`, sno `478948`) — same nine atlas handles as [`DefaultFrame`](./DefaultFrame.md), alternative composition. Used by the engine for text-heavy tooltips.

public AssetRef TextFrame { get; set; }
